---
title: "ChatGPT and Data Science Classroom"
description: |
  Some thoughts on how advances in AI are going to affect teaching data science"
author:
  - name: Shilpa Gupta, Ph.D.
    url: {https://rpubs.com/guptashilpa/964846}
date: 2023-01-04
draft: TRUE
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---

Chat.. What?

That was the reaction of my 9 year old when he heard my partner and me talk about the latest Open AI offering. The large language model has created a buzz among technologist and educators alike. 

Holiday gatherings were peppered with responses from ChatGPT and educators were mulling in the corner, how does that changes their class dynamics.
